name: Breakfast Burritos
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Potato, Par boiled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef with the onion in a pan.
2. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
3. Add the green bell pepper to the pan and cook until softened.
4. Stir in the spices (salt, black pepper, cumin), diced potatoes, and whisked eggs.
5. Cook over medium-high heat until the eggs are fully cooked through, stirring gently to ensure an even consistency.
6. Warm the flour tortillas on a hot griddle or skillet.
7. Spoon the egg and beef mixture onto each warmed tortilla.
8. Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the filling.
9. Fold the sides of the tortilla inward to create a burrito shape.
10. Serve with your choice of salsa.
